title: Manga Book / Episode Plan
description: Per-book (page manga) or per-episode (webtoon) plan. Inherits format + target_platforms from parent series_plan but can override per book/episode.

book_plan_schema.description: 1.0.0 = original Phase 0 schema (PR #632). 2.0.0 = adds master_format, flatten_exports, localized_titles per PR #631.

master_format.description: v2 — single layered source format. Inherited from parent series_plan unless overridden.

flatten_exports.description: v2 — additional flatten-export formats. Inherited from parent series_plan unless overridden.

render_manifest.description: v2 — path to R2 artifact manifest (artifacts/manifests/manga_rendered_books/<series_id>/<book_id>.yaml) once rendered. Layer 2 cloud-native pattern.

target_platforms.description: Per-book platform list (defaults to series_plan target_platforms)

engine.description: Narrative engine (false_alarm, overwhelm, spiral, shame, grief, comparison, watcher) — drives content, NOT marketing

chapter_target_count.description: For page manga: number of chapters in the volume. For webtoon: episodes per arc.

page_target_count.description: For page manga: target page count per chapter (typically 18-22 per genre conventions). For webtoon: vertical strip segments per episode (typically 30-50).
